spec_match.rationale: Pairs visual 'Fig. 3' with alt 'Figure number 3' via the alt-text segment of content — exactly the spec change.

interactive.rationale: Add/remove figure buttons drive both sides — interactive markers count 6, real dynamic behaviour.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises add/remove with both sides renumbering; the page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers add/remove but doesn't show: figure references from prose (Fig. 3 mentioned in body text), out-of-order removal, or counter-reset interactions.

references.rationale: Includes the correct chromestatus.com/feature/5185442420621312 link in see-also.

openQuestions.title: Show in-text references
openQuestions.detail: Academic writing references figures inline ('see Fig. 3'). Add a `target-counter()` companion (also extended by this spec change?) so authors see how to keep inline refs in sync with alt text.

openQuestions.title: Counter-reset and out-of-order removal
openQuestions.detail: Remove figure 2 — should figure 3 become figure 2? Show the counter-reset behaviour explicitly.

summary: Strongest interactive demo in this feature: actual add/remove buttons prove the alt side stays in sync. In-text references and counter-reset edge cases still need coverage.
